description_long: This object is a deciduous tree with a tall, upright trunk and a dense, rounded canopy of green foliage. The trunk is straight and moderately thick, with a rough, grayish-brown bark texture. The canopy is composed of numerous branches that spread outward and upward, supporting a profusion of broad, flat leaves. The foliage is lush and covers most of the branches, allowing only small glimpses of the trunk and inner structure. The tree appears healthy and robust, suitable for urban parks, sidewalks, or residential streets. No visible roots extend above the ground, and the tree's overall form is symmetrical and well-maintained.
description: A tall deciduous tree with a dense, rounded canopy of green leaves and a straight, sturdy trunk. The foliage is lush and covers most of the branches, giving the tree a healthy, full appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows a single, upright tree with a dense, oval-shaped canopy and a straight trunk.
description_view_1: Side view reveals two trees, one taller and one shorter, both with dense foliage and visible trunks.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the taller tree's full, leafy canopy with minimal trunk visibility.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows two trees, emphasizing the difference in height and canopy spread.
